# Tokenizer evaluation (Phase 2)

Corpus: `data/merged/corpus.jsonl` sha256 `cdfea262ce5898e5b35001afb2fb8899ccb531ea1c6962c39a7f1ed917e418a2`
Docs: 126,355. Word = `str.split()` token (matches corpus-quality.md).
Fertility = tokens/word; p95 is the per-doc tail (non-Latin spans and
OCR debris hide in means - critique A-3). Digit share = emitted tokens
that are ASCII-digit-only (split pattern caps runs at \p{N}{1,2}).

## Cankar-vs-Wikipedia fertility ratio (weighted-mix trigger)

- v4096: 1.956 / 2.235 = **0.875**
- v8192: 1.766 / 1.993 = **0.886**
- v16384: 1.615 / 1.797 = **0.899**

## Vocab cost under nanochat's architecture (critique MF-2)

Vocab-coupled params = (2 + ceil(L/2)) x V x dim (wte + untied lm_head +
per-every-other-layer value embeddings); dim = 64 x depth (base_train
defaults). Whether the Phase 3 budget counts embeddings is decided at
Phase 3 sizing - both numbers are here.

| candidate | depth | dim | block M | vocab M | total M | vocab share |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| v4096 | 4 | 256 | 3.15 | 4.19 | 7.34 | 57.1% |
| v4096 | 6 | 384 | 10.62 | 7.86 | 18.48 | 42.6% |
| v4096 | 8 | 512 | 25.17 | 12.58 | 37.75 | 33.3% |
| v8192 | 4 | 256 | 3.15 | 8.39 | 11.53 | 72.7% |
| v8192 | 6 | 384 | 10.62 | 15.73 | 26.35 | 59.7% |
| v8192 | 8 | 512 | 25.17 | 25.17 | 50.33 | 50.0% |
| v16384 | 4 | 256 | 3.15 | 16.78 | 19.92 | 84.2% |
| v16384 | 6 | 384 | 10.62 | 31.46 | 42.07 | 74.8% |
| v16384 | 8 | 512 | 25.17 | 50.33 | 75.50 | 66.7% |

## Corpus notes (measured during the pass)

- docs containing U+00AD soft hyphen: 191
  (survives NFC, category Cf: fractures words invisibly - candidate
  for a corpus errata pass, out of scope here)
- docs containing tabs: 543 (table/OCR debris)

## Selection

Selected candidate: **v8192**. Inside the 15-30M window at the depth-6 reference (26.35M total, 59.7% vocab share); ~10% lower fertility than v4096 on every slice and the case-paradigm probes consolidate stems (misli, žalost, črtica). v16384 busts the budget at depth 6 (42.1M) for marginal probe gains. Weighted-mix trigger not fired (Cankar/Wikipedia ratio 0.886). Revisit only if Phase 3 calibration disagrees.
